news.headline: Direct flights to Venezuela resume, but many still can’t go home
news.summary: Passengers on the first direct flight from Miami to Caracas since 2019 were excited to return but anxious about what they would find. For others, passport issues are still a hurdle.

news.headline: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
news.summary: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.

news.headline: FIFA to review World Cup ticketing after backlash over 2026 prices
news.summary: FIFA said Thursday it will review its ticketing strategy for the 2030 World Cup after a backlash over soaring prices for the 2026 tournament in North America, as officials defended costs as a reflection of demand while acknowledging fan anger.

news.headline: Arsenal vs Fulham: Premier League – teams, start, lineups, title race
news.summary: Arsenal will move six points clear of EPL title rivals Man City, who will have two games in hand, if they beat Fulham.

news.headline: Palestine FA chief hits out at Israel federation VP at FIFA Congress
news.summary: Palestine and Israel representatives had been lined up close together at the FIFA Congress in Canada.

news.headline: Britney Spears charged in California with driving under influence
news.summary: The pop star is facing one misdemeanour count of driving under the influence of any alcohol and drug.

news.headline: First US-Venezuela flight lands in Caracas after seven-year suspension
news.summary: American Airlines has resumed flights as Donald Trump moves to rebuild ties following the abduction of Nicolas Maduro.
